title: ReleaseSetManifest
description: The dashboard-owned complete release-set manifest (a2a-product-provisioning plan W01.P01.S04). One target's composite release set binds the dashboard build to the pinned A2A component (commit + emitted capsule), the runtime inputs (CPython, Node.js, ACP), the served protocol range, the state-schema/migration range, every file digest, the license set, and the software bill of materials. The dashboard consumes the A2A capsule as an opaque versioned artifact via `schemas/desktop-capsule-manifest.json` and the pin in `packaging/a2a-component.lock.json`; it rejects mismatch, floating identity, or runtime dependency resolution.

schema_version.description: Canonical MAJOR.MINOR grammar version; a consumer requires the same major and a declared minor no newer than it supports.

dashboard.description: The dashboard executable build bound into this release set.

a2a_component.description: The pinned A2A build and its emitted immutable capsule for this target, referencing the component lock and capsule manifest contract.

component_lock.description: Path to the dashboard-owned component lock pinning this A2A build.

capsule_manifest.description: Path to the A2A-owned capsule manifest contract the dashboard verifies.

capsule_digest.description: Digest of the emitted immutable capsule artifact for this target.

runtimes.description: The base-closure runtimes, each pinned to an exact version and a digest from the component lock — never a floating minor, `latest`, or runtime resolution.

protocol.description: The served gateway API version range this release set answers.

state_schema.description: The packaged Alembic migration range for the mutable schema-bearing stores.

licenses.description: The SPDX license identifier for every bound component.

sbom.description: The software bill of materials for this release set, referenced by path and pinned by digest.

file_digests.description: Optional per-file digest table for the release set's non-runtime artifacts.

TargetTriple.description: The five accepted desktop release targets, as Rust-style triples.

DigestAlgorithm.description: The algorithm governing every digest in this manifest.

GitCommit.description: A full 40-hex git commit sha — never a branch, tag, or floating ref.

ExactVersion.description: An exact version — no range operator, wildcard, or `latest`.
